questions.question: Find the next number in the series: 12, 19, 26, 33, 40, ?
questions.explanation: The series follows an Arithmetic Progression with a constant difference of 7. So, 40 + (7) = 47.
questions.trick: Always check the difference between the first and second terms and verify across the series.

questions.question: Which is the longest river in the world?
Who was the first President of India?
If an article is bought for Rs. 360 and sold at a profit of 20%, what is the selling price?
questions.trick: Calculate 10% of CP, multiply, and add it conceptually.

questions.question: If BAT is coded as EDW, how will CUP be coded in that same language?
questions.explanation: Each letter is shifted forward by exactly 3 positions in the English alphabet.
questions.trick: Note the position gap between the first letter of the word and the first letter of its code.

questions.question: Which is the largest planet in our solar system?
A train travels at an average speed of 98 km/hr. How much distance will it cover in 2 hours?
questions.trick: Basic multiplication rule: D = S * T.

questions.question:
Statements:
1. All Apples are Fruits.
2. All Fruits are Foods.

Which conclusion logically follows?
questions.explanation: If A is a subset of B, and B is a subset of C, then A must be a subset of C completely.
questions.trick: Draw a venn diagram: Small circle A inside Medium B inside Large C.

questions.question: A can complete a piece of work in 10 days while B can complete the same work in 29 days. If they work together, in how many days will they complete the work?
questions.explanation: Work = 10 * 29 = 290. Rate = 10 + 29 = 39. Time = Work / Rate = 7.44 days.

questions.question: Who wrote the national anthem of India?
Find the next number in the series: 4, 12, 36, 108, ?
questions.explanation: The series follows a Geometric Progression with a constant multiplier ratio of 3. So, 108 * 3 = 324.
questions.trick: If numbers scale up very quickly, look for multiplication rather than addition.

questions.question: What will be the Simple Interest on a principal amount of Rs. 2700 at an interest rate of 8% per annum over 3 years?
